title: zea mays subsp. everta
intro: Zea mays subsp. everta, also known as popcorn or sweet corn, is a subspecies of the maize plant, characterized by its ability to 'pop' when heated, resulting in the formation of a fluffy and lightweight snack. The medicinal properties of Zea mays subsp. everta include its antidiabetic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Zea mays subsp. everta include its high fiber content, which can help regulate digestion and lower cholesterol levels, as well as its rich source of vitamins and minerals. Zea mays subsp. everta can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, or used as a dietary supplement in capsule or powder form.
